values.QID287_TEXT: Access to small meeting rooms and conference rooms with screens and whiteboards for collaboration
values.QID365_TEXT: Some professional project staff (approx. 50 at current levels) visit the office weekly at different times and a lower quantity (approx. 20 at current levels) may work from the office for several weeks between assignments or for project planning.  Trainings are conducted at the main office that may draw in anywhere between 20-50 people for a day.  Large meetings, events, or trainings with outside or industry organizations or associations may be hosted at the main office also based on availability and capacity.
values.QID325_TEXT: getting everyone under the same roof

values.QID253_TEXT: The VDC group provides 3D designs of our projects for collaboration, field installation conflict resolution, and fabrication.
values.QID318_9_TEXT: Secure Storage is to store the BIM and Scanning equipment. This includes BIM computers and monitors and scanning and layout equipment
values.QID319_TEXT: The VDC group does 100% of their work on computers and is always asking for lighting to be darker to reduce the glare on their monitors. They are also having multiple meetings a day on Teams for collaboration and having an area that’s not in a busy area is helpful. They currently use noise cancelling headphones.
values.QID287_TEXT: Most of the other depts we need to work closely with and collaborate with are on the project sites. Specifically the project superintendents and project managers. It is beneficial for the dept managers to be able to collaborate with the other dept managers, but doesn’t need to be next to each other to do so.
values.QID365_TEXT: Monthly for a few day for collaboration, training and meetings
values.QID325_TEXT: Ability to step into a quite space for a meeting when needed.
values.QID326_TEXT: We do have a VDC Work Force Development dept that has a classroom for training new hires and interns. Typically 6-8 training plus 1 instructor

values.QID253_TEXT:
Ensure consistency, credibility, and alignment of the enterprise brand across all internal and external touchpoints.

Focus Areas:
1. Internal Communications & Engagement
Includes Company Update and Videos

2. Execute Marketing Campaigns & Enterprise Initiatives
Trainings, Business Development, Recruiting, Workforce Development, & Culture Activation

3. In-House Studio
Headshots, Team Photography, Instructional Videos, Training & Presentations, Creative Asset Execution, Podcasts
values.QID319_TEXT: Ideally, a flexible space that offers both creative stimulation and the ability to focus. For some of our creatives (web dev, designers, videographers, editors), having the ability to have the space dark is essential when in their creative flow and focused on their screens. We have a wide range of creatives who do a fair share of collaborative brainstorming and head down time. In addition, having the space feel inspiring visually helps.
values.QID287_TEXT: I believe it's essential for the building and design to reflect our enterprise's personality/ culture - bold, creative, and inspiring. We overall as an enterprise, attract high-performing individuals, so having a space that supports this is important. The building will need options to meet each others needs (quiet zone, collabroation zones, etc.) all while having plenty of meeting spaces.
values.QID296_TEXT: We have work from home once a week for all. Developers and Editors are able to do 2 days a week as needed.

values.QID253_TEXT: Recruiting, Workforce Development, Benefits, Payroll, Wellness (apex), Employee Relations
values.QID319_TEXT: The core HR team (benefits/payroll) needs to the ability to have private screens for viewing sensitive information and a quiet space to talk to employees. The Recruiting team is on the phone a lot- they need a space where others around them are not bothered by consistent talking. Additionally, HR and Recruiting (not WFD) needs to be in an area with similar employees as much of the information both departments talk about may be sensitive.
values.QID287_TEXT:
Majority of the People team is in person. The whole team does not need to be in close physical proximity, but there are sub departments that I would like together. For example, all of recruiting should be together, all of HR (benefits, payroll, HR admins, people experience) should be together. L&D/WFD there is more flexibility as they do not deal with sensitive information and are more collaborative. 
It would be ideal if my managers/Directors had their own space/office as they do deal with a lot of sensitive information/conversations.
values.QID365_TEXT: Varies, average of a month. Roles include HR business partners, WFD Craft Trainers, and a few recruiters.

values.QID253_TEXT: We focus on providing wellness services to the enterprise employees and their families. This includes physical, mental, and nutritional wellness. We also maintain our wellness center.
values.QID315_12_TEXT: We need a large space for our wellness center with at least 3 individual spaces to hold 10 people each
values.QID319_TEXT: Access to daylight, access to privacy, ergonomic desks and chairs.
values.QID360_4_TEXT: Soundproofing from rest of company. It can get loud and disrupt workflow for nearby employees
values.QID287_TEXT: We need to be located at the wellness center and be able to go to others when needed.
values.QID326_TEXT: We have a Sport court, Weight area, Cardio area, Yoga room, Recovery room, Mental health room, Game room, and Golf simulator.
